description: Code similarity pairs for retrieval quality evaluation. Handcrafted realistic code samples covering common patterns (JSON, APIs, validation, sorting, error handling, database, auth, file I/O).
note: Phase 3 baseline. Expand with benchmark datasets (RepoBench-R, LongMemEval) in Phase 4.

queries.query: function to parse JSON string into object
async function that fetches data from API

documents.text: const sortAscending = (numbers) => numbers.slice().sort((x, y) => x - y);
